articles.title: England's crisis meets NZ's opportunity at Trent Bridge
articles.description: Weather conditions - hot, especially on the first day - enhances the prospect of spin playing a significant part for the first time in the Test series

articles.title: Nandre Burger ruled out of rest of MLC 2026
articles.description: The South Africa left-arm quick has been sidelined due to a pre-existing stress reaction in his back

articles.title: Yo Mahesh appointed TN head coach; Sandeep Patil named Mumbai mentor
articles.description: Yo Mahesh will take over from Senthilnathan and Venkataramana, who had split coaching duties in the previous season

articles.title: Sooryavanshi to change separately from India team-mates in England
articles.description: The ECB said the decision is in accordance with its safeguarding policies for players under 16

articles.title: India, South Africa eye NRR boost in close Group 1 race
articles.description: South Africa won the only T20I they played against Netherlands in 2010, while India hold a 20-3 head-to-head record against Bangladesh

articles.title: Latham calls upon NZ to keep 'raising the bar' in bid for Test series win
articles.description: After completing an "old-school" 253-run win at The Oval, the NZ captain pushes for more glory at Trent Bridge

articles.title: Pandey: 'Harmanpreet Kaur's strike rate is a cause for concern'
articles.description: Former India bowler believes Harmanpreet will be better served by freeing herself up while batting in the middle order

articles.title: Stokes 'desperate' to make the difference for England after apologising for nightclub impact
articles.description: England captain returns after missing second Test with sole focus on the coming five days

articles.title: Shadab, Philippe join Lancashire, Surrey for Vitality Blast
articles.description: Both could be in action for next round of matches on Friday

articles.title: Bob Blair, who soldiered on after Tangiwai disaster, dies aged 94
articles.description: Blair played 19 Tests from 1953 to 1964, taking 43 wickets at an average of 35.23

articles.title: MPL T20 2026: Semi-Final 1, RNE vs RJ Match Prediction – Who will win today’s MPL T20 match between Royal Nimar Eagles vs Rewa Jaguars?
articles.description: Royal Nimar Eagles (RNE) lock horns with Rewa Jaguars (RJ) in semi-final 1 of the ongoing Madhya Pradesh T20 League 2026 at the Holkar Stadium in Indore on Wednesday, June 24.

articles.title: Why India are handing out more international debuts than ever?
articles.description: India have handed several caps to youngsters over the last few years. This decision from the selectors and the team management has received mixed responses from fans and experts.

articles.title: Stampede-like situation at Jharkhand Premier League final leaves several injured in Ranchi
articles.description: Crowd surge at single open gate on 23 June forces police reinforcements as district administration orders official probe into security failure.

articles.title: ‘Can he go the distance?’ - Kapil Dev sets challenge for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
articles.description: Sooryavanshi has enjoyed a meteoric rise over the past year and is now on the verge of making his senior India debut after being named in the squad for the upcoming T20I tour of Ireland.

articles.title: Women's T20 World Cup 2026: Match 24, SA W vs NED W Match Prediction – Who will win today’s match between India Women vs Bangladesh Women?
articles.description: South Africa Women take on the Netherlands Women in match No. 24 of the ongoing Women's T20 World Cup 2026. This match will be hosted at the County Ground in Bristol on Thursday, June 25.

articles.title: APL 2026: Match 24, TW vs KK Match Prediction – Who will win today’s APL match between Tungabhadra Warriors vs Kakinada Kings?
articles.description: Both sides come into the game on the back of defeats in their previous encounters.

articles.title: Pakistan players to fly to United States to fine-tune hitting skills
articles.description: "We're sending some players to the US. There's some power-hitting expertise over there, and we're exploring some options," head coach Mike Hesson said.

articles.title: 'Shreyas Iyer and Shubman Gill are captains who have lots of empathy' - Suryansh Shedge's mentor Jatin Paranjape
articles.description: Suryansh Shedge's mentor, Jatin Paranjape, urged the 23-year-old to learn as much as he can during his time with the Indian team in the upcoming T20I series against Ireland and England.

articles.title: 'I grew up watching Irfan Pathan bowl' - Nandni Sharma reveals cricketers who inspired her
articles.description: Nandni Sharma said she began playing alongside the boys very early in her cricketing journey, and that helped her improve quickly.
